title: tessmannia lescrauwaetii
intro: Tessmannia lescrauwaetii, also known as African star anise, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Tessmannia lescrauwaetii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Tessmannia lescrauwaetii are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, often used in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
